user.title: Connect to zencontrol controller
user.description: Enter the details for your zencontrol application controller. Note that the controller must have a TPI Advanced license attached.

data.label: Controller name
data.unicast: Use unicast events (not recommended - only use if broadcast packets are unsupported by your network topology)

data_description.mac: Leave blank and submit to look up from the host IP (same subnet only). Confirm the value, then submit again.

add_another.title: Add another controller
add_another.description: Configure an additional zencontrol application controller for this integration.

data_description.mac: Leave blank and submit to look up from the host IP (same subnet only). Confirm the value, then submit again.

add_more.title: Add more controllers?
add_more.description: You can add another controller now, or finish setup.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure zencontrol
reconfigure.description: Choose a controller to edit, or change unicast settings.

reconfigure_controller.title: Reconfigure controller
reconfigure_controller.description: Update connection settings for this zencontrol application controller.

data_description.mac: Leave blank and submit to look up from the host IP (same subnet only). Confirm the value, then submit again.

unicast_settings.title: Unicast settings
unicast_settings.description: Unicast is shared by all controllers in this integration.

data.unicast: Use unicast events (not recommended - only use if broadcast packets are unsupported by your network topology)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the controller. Check the host/port and try again.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.mac_not_found: Could not discover a MAC address for that host. Enter it manually (same subnet required for lookup).
error.duplicate_mac: A controller with this MAC address is already configured.

abort.already_configured: This zencontrol application controller is already configured.

init.title: Manage controllers
init.description: Add or remove zencontrol application controllers.

add_controller.title: Add controller
add_controller.description: Enter the details for an additional zencontrol application controller.

data_description.mac: Leave blank and submit to look up from the host IP (same subnet only). Confirm the value, then submit again.

remove_controller.title: Remove controller
remove_controller.description: Select a controller to remove. At least one controller must remain.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the controller. Check the host/port and try again.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.mac_not_found: Could not discover a MAC address for that host. Enter it manually (same subnet required for lookup).
error.duplicate_mac: A controller with this MAC address is already configured.
